query:
UPDATE proposal_templates
        SET name        = COALESCE($3, name),
            description = COALESCE($4, description),
            manifest    = COALESCE($5, manifest),
            enabled     = COALESCE($6, enabled),
            pinned      = COALESCE($7, pinned)
        WHERE dao_id = $1 AND id = $2
        RETURNING id
